sections.paragraph: with suff. עֶשְּׂבָּם plur. constr. עִשְּׂבֹות (with Dag. euphon.) Pro 27:25 green herb, full grown and in seed (in which it differs from דֶּשֶׁא); herbs for the food of man, Gen 1:11, 12 2:5 3:18 Exo 10:12, 15 Exo 10:15 Psa 104:14 (Arab. عُشْبُ id. From the same stock are, perhaps, herba, φορβή, r and s being interchanged).
